item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Thursday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
just some incredible costumes.. happy halloween gang! greetings
was not wondering
mmm... cheeese
not cool
uncanny
sounds about right
yes she made a grammatical error
did anyone get to meet this legend??
no good scabs right now
mmm hmm
thems the breaks
sounds like a pretty sweet deal
accurate
jesus tap dancing christ
i guess
i've been trying to reach quite a few imgurians telepathically, is it working?
dislike
that's my time.. stay safe out there and have a great night!!

item.title: They're eating the Dawgs!

item.title: Happy Halloween from the NICU
item.description: My wife has always said if she had an October baby she wanted to dress him up as a slug lol. Well grandma pulled through and crocheted a slug costume, with bonus matching hats for mom and dad.

item.title: Mid-Transformation Sexy Werewolf Costume
item.description: Happy Halloween from your Mid-TRANSformation Sexy Werewolf ?
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Ask and ye shall receive.
item.description:
Okay, to be clear, I was the one who asked. In my previous post. (Found here: https://imgur.com/gallery/2whpFtX) A few of the commenters there mentioned that, instead of complaining, I could provide the content I'm looking for. Which is fair I suppose, but seeing as how I'm not a male person I cannot create my own slutty male costume. I have therefore stepped up to the plate and stolen a few videos to share from one of my favourite cosplay content creators for all to enjoy.
Saved the best for last (imo). I did have to cut off the beginning of a couple of these videos to get them under the 1 minute time limit, but if you want to see more, here he is on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/silver__rox
item.dc:creator: MizWeirdo

item.title: Images of Note: Keep Honking
item.description:
nomnomnomnomnomnomnomnomnomnomnomnomnomnomnomnom
SI SI SI SI SI SI SI SI SI SI SI SI SI SI SI SI SI SI SI SI SI SI SI SI SI SI
Fun fact, according to the Gnostics the Tower of Babel was made to fight God.
GET IN THE HOLE
Later on in the article, an OpEd about how this is all the fault of Transgender people and proof wokeness has destroyed the UK.
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
Cronchy =w=
Guise the Lord/Lady Provost (Mayor) of my city wears a big fuck-off chain
O_ O
>:3
BELIAL, BEHEMOTH, BEELZEBUB! ASMODEDUS, SATANAS, LUCIFER!
That is the most baddass thing I have ever seen
I should make some liminal horror
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Así están hoy las calles de Valencia en España después del paso de la DANA. Lo peor las personas que han fallecido. Estamos todos de luto. ??

item.title: Minions
item.dc:creator: Capinron

item.title: Resident evil scientist for Halloween!
item.description:
I recently played the remake of Resident Evil 2 and 3 and really wanted to be part of Umbrella corporation for Halloween!
It was pretty perfect because I unfortunately ( :( ) didn't have much time to make an advanced costume this year.
Before ironing hehe
Got a syringe pet feeder that I made into a vessel for the vaccine!
Hurray a cure is here!
Got my pockets full of T-virus as well guys so look out!
I made this first side page of the raccoon city times and since my dad works at a newspaper printing house I asked him to print a bunch of them for me!
Fresh out of the print! Stay safe out there you guys! It's a Zombie outbreak!
I'm gonna eat your brains!!
Also I won the costume party at my favorite bar last night!! I was SO happy!
HAPPY HALLOWEEN!! Can anyone tell what scientist I was first influenced by? (but then ended up not sticking to) The glasses might be a giveaway! #costumecontest #halloween #residentevil #umbrellacorporation #cosplay
item.dc:creator: Miiaka

item.title: Articuno Cosplay
item.description:
Homemade Articuno cosplay
First time making a mounted tail, which is admittedly super scuffed. Will sew the fleece tail higher and make a small blue sleeve to cover the wood.
